## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] No secrets in the diff (`.env`, tokens, keys)
- [ ] Docs / i18n updated if user-facing
